name: io.github.github/github-mcp-server
description: Connect AI assistants to GitHub - manage repos, issues, PRs, and workflows through natural language.
title: GitHub

runtimeArguments.name: -p
runtimeArguments.description: Publish the OAuth callback port to loopback so the in-container login callback is reachable

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Fixed OAuth callback port, matching the published port above

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub Personal Access Token. Omit to log in with OAuth on first use.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub App ID for installation authentication.

runtimeArguments.name: -v
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub App private key PEM file mounted read-only into the container.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional path to the mounted GitHub App private key PEM file.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional command that writes the GitHub App private key PEM to stdout. Use instead of GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub App installation ID. Use this or one lookup target.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub organization used to resolve the App installation ID.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub repository in owner/repo form used to resolve the App installation ID.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Optional GitHub user used to resolve the App installation ID.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Authorization header with authentication token (PAT or App token)
